objective: Fixture: external_tool_activity present but NO accepted review/test evidence — warn mode should warn and allow, not deny.
acceptance_criteria: In warn mode, completion is warned-and-allowed when external_tool_activity references are the only activity and required evidence is absent.

hard_rule_traces.description: External-tool output is input-only; in warn mode missing gates produce a warning rather than a denial, but tool activity still does not count as accepted evidence.

external_tool_activity.limitations: Cannot approve evidence gates or record customer truth independently.
